name: quioteframework/quiote
description: Quiote is a full-featured MVC-style framework for PHP 8.5+ with a strong focus on structure, code reusability and flexibility.

suggest.phpunit/phpunit: Install phpunit if you want to run your tests
suggest.ext-xsl: Required only for transformation of pre 1.0 style configuration files
suggest.ext-tokenizer: Enable the tokenizer extension allows Quiote to generate more efficient config-caches
suggest.ext-session: If the session extension is disabled you'll have to build your own session storage system and hook it into quiote
suggest.ext-pdo: PDO is required for database connectors that use PDO as base
suggest.illuminate/database: Enables the 'eloquent' database driver (Quiote\Database\Adapter\Eloquent\EloquentDatabase); see docs/DATABASE_ADAPTERS_PLAN.md
suggest.doctrine/dbal: Enables the 'doctrine_dbal' database driver (query builder without the ORM)
suggest.cycle/orm: Enables the 'cycle' database driver (Quiote\Database\Adapter\Cycle\CycleDatabase); pair with cycle/database
suggest.cycle/database: Cycle's database abstraction layer, required by the 'cycle' driver
suggest.ext-iconv: Enable iconv if you need to convert between other charset than iso-8859-1 and utf-8
suggest.open-telemetry/api: Install these open-telemetry/* packages to enable the telemetry.* settings family (see docs/OPENTELEMETRY_PLAN.md)
suggest.open-telemetry/sdk: OpenTelemetry SDK: providers, processors, samplers, resource detection
suggest.open-telemetry/exporter-otlp: OTLP exporter for traces and metrics
suggest.symfony/tui: Install to enable the `telemetry:dashboard` CLI command (see docs/TELEMETRY_DASHBOARD_PLAN.md)
suggest.mcp/sdk: Enables the MCP server capability (Quiote\Mcp\McpPlugin, `mcp:serve`); see docs/MCP_SERVER_PLAN.md

scripts-descriptions.test: Run the full test suite with APCu disabled (default, deterministic).
scripts-descriptions.test:apcu: Run only the APCu config-cache tests with apc.enable_cli=1.
scripts-descriptions.test:e2e: Run the Docker-based end-to-end tests (real OTel Collector + real FrankenPHP). Requires Docker; not run in CI.
scripts-descriptions.test:integration: Run the Docker-based database integration tests against real DBs via Testcontainers (Doctrine, Eloquent, Cycle). Requires Docker; not run in CI.
